fields.description: The unverified address that submitted the signup form. Becomes the owner of the produced Site on fulfilment (Contract C). Not a Link to User — no User exists until verification.
fields.label: Email

fields.description: The bare DNS label the user wants (e.g. acme). Validated with the SAME Contract-A rules as Site (single dotless label, not reserved) so a request can't reserve a name Site would reject. Authoritative uniqueness is still Site's FQDN key at fulfilment.
fields.label: Subdomain

fields.description: The regional wildcard zone + proxy fleet the future site is fronted by, resolved from the active Root Domain at request time (the user never picks it).
fields.label: Region

fields.description: Pending (awaiting email verification) → Verified → Fulfilled (the Site was created); Expired when the token TTL lapses. No droplet/site work happens until Fulfilled (Contract C).
fields.label: Status

fields.description: The verification secret (frappe.generate_hash). The link emailed to the user carries it; the verify route looks the request up by this. Never shown in list views.
fields.label: Token

fields.description: When the user actually clicked the verification link (status → Verified). The token-expiry clock is the row's built-in creation timestamp, not this — a token is valid for a fixed TTL from creation, and an expired token is rejected by the verify route.
fields.label: Verified At

fields.description: The Site produced on fulfilment (step 5). Set once, links the request to the resource it created.
fields.label: Site
